headline: Eaton Declares Quarterly Dividend Payable May 29, 2026
summary: DUBLIN, April 21, 2026--The Board of Directors of intelligent power management company Eaton (NYSE:ETN) today declared a quarterly dividend of $1.10 per ordinary share. The dividend is payable May 29, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 8, 2026. Eaton has paid dividends on its shares every year since 1923.

headline: Eaton Sharpens AI Data Center Focus While Deepening Aerospace Aftermarket Reach
summary: Eaton (NYSE:ETN) has created a dedicated Data Center segment following its acquisition of Boyd's thermal management business. The new segment is focused on integrated power systems and liquid cooling solutions aimed at AI focused data centers. Separately, Eaton expanded its aerospace aftermarket footprint through a new authorized service partnership with Air Support. For you as an investor, these moves highlight where Eaton is putting its energy and capital. The new Data Center segment...

headline: Eaton to announce first quarter 2026 earnings on May 5, 2026
summary: DUBLIN, April 21, 2026--Intelligent power management company Eaton (NYSE:ETN) will announce first quarter 2026 earnings on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, before the opening of the New York Stock Exchange. The company will host a conference call at 11 a.m. Eastern time that day to discuss first quarter 2026 earnings results.
